text:
Once upon a time, in a village nestled deep within the woods, there lived a poet. His name was Olly. He loved to sit in his hut by the windows overlooking oak trees.

Every day Olly would compose poetry. In fact, it was quite famous amongst the birds. One particular songbird loved his work so much, she’d fly miles just to listen.

Olly loved his songs. He felt magic whenever he wrote them.

One summer, an ominous cloud hovered over village secrets. Strange noises were heard at night.

One moonlit night, Olly heard something. It might have just been wind.

But just maybe…

...it was a visitor. Just one.

That night Olly dreamed he met an enchanted old wise owl.

The owl spoke soft words. About a wish.

Olly wished he could save his village.

That night, an owl perched on his roof. They talked.

And later that night, the owl swooped down. It wasn’t just wind
